'''Chiru''' or '''sand wasps''' were [[Insect/Legends|insects]] native to [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]]. They were named the [[Socorran (language)/Legends|Socorran]] word for "deadly." Their hives could number over two hundred thousand. They were known to attack whole groups of nomads on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="BSS" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]''
